---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an idea for this project

---

> Check the [Roadmap](https://github.com/Polonium-ch/Selene#-roadmap) first - if what you want is already listed there, there's no need to open a duplicate. Feel free to comment on it instead if you want to add context.

**Area**
- [ ] Streaming (video/audio)
- [ ] Input (keyboard/mouse/gamepad)
- [ ] Discovery & Pairing
- [ ] Settings & Personalization
- [ ] Other (please specify below)

**Is your feature request related to a problem? Please describe.**
A clear and concise description of what the problem is. Ex. I'm always frustrated when [...]

**Describe the solution you'd like**
A clear and concise description of what you want to happen.

**Describe alternatives you've considered**
A clear and concise description of any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

**Prior art**
Does another Moonlight client, the legacy Qt build, or a similar app already do this well? Screenshots or links are helpful here.

**Additional context**
Add any other context, mockups, or screenshots about the feature request here.
